description_long: This is a tall, freestanding wooden cabinet with ornate decorative features, including carved patterns along the top and bottom edges. The front features two vertically aligned doors, each with louvered lower panels and open upper sections, adorned with a row of black quatrefoil cutouts and a central blue and red floral motif. The sides and back are plain, with visible rivets or nail heads along the edges, and the wood has a weathered, rustic finish. The top surface is flat with additional carved detailing, suitable for placing small objects. The cabinet appears to have open shelving behind the doors, with no visible handles or knobs. Its design suggests a blend of functional storage and decorative urban street furniture, possibly for use in public spaces or outdoor settings.
description: A tall, rustic wooden cabinet with ornate carvings, louvered doors, and colorful floral motifs, featuring open shelving and a weathered finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing two louvered doors with open upper sections, decorative cutouts, and a blue-red floral motif.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain wooden panel with visible rivets and a flat, carved top.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain wooden surface, some visible wear, and decorative carving along the top and bottom edges.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a plain wooden panel and visible rivets.
